overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk along the Night City waterfront at dusk. The player passes towering digital billboards, crosses a busy intersection, and continues along a palm-lined promenade with the neon-lit skyline visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront sidewalk with digital advertising towers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront sidewalk past towering digital billboards and neon signage

entered.detail: tall multi-screen advertising structure displaying animated neon advertisements
metal safety railing separating the sidewalk from the water below
futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents across the water
large illuminated bridge structure spanning the water in the distance
tall palm tree trunk visible along the waterfront edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a waterfront sidewalk at dusk, with a massive digital billboard tower dominating the left side. The camera moves forward along the concrete path, with the neon-lit Night City skyline visible across the water to the right, framed by a distant arched bridge.

events.description: stepping off the sidewalk and entering the marked crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
vehicles passing through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: navigating across the multi-lane intersection while monitoring passing traffic

notable_agents.action: dark-colored sedan driving through the intersection from left to right
white car approaching and stopping at the crosswalk

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing with white stripes across the asphalt
illuminated traffic lights and pedestrian crossing signals

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the waterfront sidewalk and enters a wide urban intersection, crossing the multi-lane street. Vehicles pass by in both directions as the camera navigates the crosswalk, with the waterfront railing now visible at a distance to the right.

events.description: reaching the opposite curb and continuing along the waterfront promenade

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket walking steadily ahead on the promenade

entered.detail: illuminated benches with red lighting underneath, positioned along the railing
large rectangular overhead lighting structure spanning the promenade

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the camera continues along a palm-lined waterfront promenade, following a pedestrian in a white jacket. The path features illuminated benches and overhead lighting structures, with the neon skyline and arched bridge remaining visible across the water to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a towering digital waterfront district across a busy urban intersection and onto a serene, palm-lined promenade. It begins on a concrete sidewalk dominated by a massive billboard tower on the left, while the neon-lit Night City skyline and a distant arched bridge frame the view across the water to the right. As the camera moves forward, it leaves the waterfront path to navigate a wide multi-lane intersection, crossing the street amidst passing vehicles. The scene then shifts back toward the coast, following a pedestrian in a white jacket along a promenade featuring illuminated benches and overhead lighting. Finally, the camera continues its steady pace under the dusk sky, keeping the glowing skyline and bridge in sight across the water.
